title: Celebrate World Maritime Day
summary:
IMO Secretary-General Message
Watch IMO Secretary-General Arsenio Dominguez video message on the World Maritime Day theme 2024:

How does IMO's ship safety treaty make a difference? The International Convention for the Safety of Life at Sea ( SOLAS ) is the main and most important international treaty concerning the safety of merchant ships. The SOLAS Convention contains 15 chapters covering a variety of topics.
